scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n auth,roster,request,user,analytics,gateway -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:roster" "npm run dev:request" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:analytics" "sleep 2 && npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n auth,roster,request,user,analytics,gateway -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "node dist/services/auth-service.js" "node dist/services/roster-service.js" "node dist/services/request-service.js" "node dist/services/user-service.js" "node dist/services/analytics-service.js" "sleep 2 && node dist/services/gateway.js"
